title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into and Sign in a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Department of Social Welfare and Development DSWD) Field Office Iv-a with Regard to the Implementation of Social Pension for Indigent Senior Citizens (SOCPEN) Program in the Municipality of Los Baños and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR JONATHAN BRYAN S. SIYTIAP, 10/03/2022)
